name: Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana
overview: Infinitum Media presents Thondara Padaku Sundara Vadhana , a rom com featuring Don Pruthvi over a series of love stories through the course of his life. What happens due to his attitude of rushing through life and love forms the series
